calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Granted Per Written Order

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-15-2019 Reset To Aug-20-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Petitioner Tekleab Zeray Gebreseassie, a/k/a Tekleab Gebreselassie was present in pro per.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted once petitioner obtains the signed written consent of the minor's other parent, Theresa.

Matter is CONTINUED to Tuesday, August 20, 2019 for further OSC for Change of Name of a Minor.
